---
title: "Schön, Schlau, Single"
subtitle: "Wie Dating-Plattformen uns irreführen"
author: "Sebastian Sauer"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
    slide-number: true
    css: [default, style.scss]
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    #dev: png
    echo: false
    #dev.args: { bg: "transparent" }
    message: false
execute:
  cache: true
---





```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggdag)
```


```{r}
focus_color = "black"
```


##  {.center}



::::: columns

:::: {.column width="48%"}


::: {style="font-size: 2em; text-align: center"}
🧑


„Ich bin schön und schlau, aber finde keine Frau!“


:::
::::





:::: {.column width="48%"}

::: {style="font-size: 2em; text-align: center"}

👵

„Naja“

:::



::::


:::::



::::: columns
::: {.column width="20%"}
[👨🏾‍🦰]{.r-fit-text}
Don
::::

:::: {.column width="80%"}
[Ich bin schön und schlau.]{.r-fit-text}

[Aber ich finde keine Frau!]{.r-fit-text}
::::
:::::


---


##  {.center}



::: columns
::: {.column width="20%"}
[👨🏾‍🦰]{.r-fit-text}
Don
:::

::: {.column width="80%"}
[Meine Dates sind entweder nur schön, oder nur schlau.]{.r-fit-text}

[Ich will beides!]{.r-fit-text}
:::
:::


---

## Ein Rendezvous, vier Möglichkeiten



```{r}
p_vierfelder <-
  ggplot() +
  # Achsen mit Pfeilen
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = -1.2, xend = 1.2, y = 0, yend = 0),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")),
    linewidth = 0.7,
    color = focus_color
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = 0, y = -1.2, yend = 1.2),
    arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")),
    linewidth = 0.7,
    color = focus_color
  ) +
  
  # Quadranten-Beschriftungen
  annotate("text", x =  0.6, y =  0.6, label = "schön: +\nschlau: +", color = focus_color) +
  annotate("text", x = -0.6, y =  0.6, label = "schön: -\nschlau: +", color = focus_color) +
  annotate("text", x =  0.6, y = -0.6, label = "schön: +\nschlau: -", color = focus_color) +
  annotate("text", x = -0.6, y = -0.6, label = "schön: -\nschlau: -", color = focus_color) +
  
  # Achsenlabels
  annotate("text", x = 1.25, y = -0.08, label = "Schönheit", hjust = 1, color = focus_color) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.05, y = 1.25, label = "Schlauheit", hjust = 1, angle = 90, color = focus_color) +
  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-1.3, 1.3), ylim = c(-1.3, 1.3), clip = "off") +
  theme_void()


p_vierfelder
```




<!-- ## Ein Rendezvous, vier Möglichkeiten -->

<!-- </br> -->
<!-- </br> -->


<!-- |                    | Schön +                 | Nicht schön -                  | -->
<!-- |--------------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------| -->
<!-- | **Schlau +**       | **schön und schlau**    | schlau und nicht schön         | -->
<!-- | **Nicht schlau -** | nicht schlau und schön  | **nicht schlau und nicht schön** | -->


<!-- --- -->

## Die Schönen sind nicht schlau, und die Schlauen nicht schön?


```{r}
myf <- function(x) -x+0.75

myf2 <- function(x) -x + 1.25

n <- 1e3

set.seed(42)
d2 <- tibble(
  x = runif(n),
  y = runif(n),
  status = case_when(
    y > myf(x) | y < myf2(x) ~ TRUE,
    TRUE ~ FALSE
  )
)

d2 <- d2 %>% 
  mutate(
    status_label = ifelse(status, "Date", "kein Date"),
    symbol = ifelse(status, "✓", "✗")
  )

myf <- function(x) -x + 0.75
myf2 <- function(x) -x + 1.25

n <- 1e3

set.seed(42)

d2 <- tibble(
  x = runif(n),
  y = runif(n)
) %>% 
mutate(
    status = xor(
      y < myf(x),
      y < myf2(x)
    )
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    status_label = ifelse(status, "Date", "kein Date"),
    symbol = ifelse(status, "✓", "✗")
  )

p_coll1 <- 
  d2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, color = status_label, label = symbol)) +
  geom_text() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("kein Date" = "grey80",
               "Date" = "black"),
    guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(label = c("✓", "✗"))
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Schönheit",
    y = "Schlauheit",
    color = NULL
  ) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          axis.text = element_blank(),
           axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_blank())

p_coll1
```



---

## Gott ist ... nicht ungerecht (?) 

</br>
</br>
  

![](img/god1.png)


---


## Die Schönen sind genauso schlau wie die Nicht-Schönen


```{r}
myf <- function(x) -x+0.75

myf2 <- function(x) -x + 1.25

n <- 1e3

set.seed(42)
d2 <- tibble(
  x = runif(n),
  y = runif(n),
  status = case_when(
    y > myf(x) | y < myf2(x) ~ TRUE,
    TRUE ~ FALSE
  )
)

d2 <- d2 %>% 
  mutate(
    status_label = ifelse(status, "Date", "kein Date"),
    symbol = ifelse(status, "✓", "✗")
  )

myf <- function(x) -x + 0.75
myf2 <- function(x) -x + 1.25

n <- 1e3

set.seed(42)

d2 <- tibble(
  x = runif(n),
  y = runif(n)
) 

p_coll0 <- 
  d2 %>% 
  ggplot() +
  aes(x  = x,
      y = y) +
  geom_point() +
 # scale_color_manual(values = c("grey80", "black")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(x = "Schönheit",
       y = "Schlauheit") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          axis.text = element_blank(),
           axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_blank())


p_coll0
```





---

## Stellen Sie sich nach Schlauheit und Schönheit auf


```{r}
p_vierfelder
```


---

## Ziehen Sie einen Zettel für Schönheit und einen für Schlauheit


```{r}
set.seed(20260509)
schoen_schlau <-
  tibble(
    schoen = rnorm(30),
    schlau = rnorm(30),
    schoen_pr = percent_rank(schoen),
    schlau_pr = percent_rank(schlau)
  )
```



### Schönheit

```{r}
x <- round(schoen_schlau$schoen_pr, 2)
x_fmt <- sprintf("%5.2f", x)
cat(
  sapply(
    split(x_fmt, ceiling(seq_along(x_fmt) / 10)),
    paste,
    collapse = " "
  ),
  sep = "\n"
)
```



### Schlauheit

```{r}
x <- round(schoen_schlau$schlau_pr, 2)
x_fmt <- sprintf("%5.2f", x)
cat(
  sapply(
    split(x_fmt, ceiling(seq_along(x_fmt) / 10)),
    paste,
    collapse = " "
  ),
  sep = "\n"
)
```


---

## 👨🏾‍🦰 Aber ich nehm nicht jede!


```{r}
myf <- function(x) -x+0.75

myf2 <- function(x) -x + 1.25

n <- 1e3

set.seed(42)
d2 <- tibble(
  x = runif(n),
  y = runif(n),
  status = case_when(
    y > myf(x) | y < myf2(x) ~ TRUE,
    TRUE ~ FALSE
  )
)

d2 <- d2 %>% 
  mutate(
    status_label = ifelse(status, "Date", "kein Date"),
    symbol = ifelse(status, "✓", "✗")
  )

myf <- function(x) -x + 0.75
myf2 <- function(x) -x + 1.25

n <- 1e3

set.seed(42)

d2 <- tibble(
  x = runif(n),
  y = runif(n)
) %>% 
  mutate(
    status = !(y < myf(x) & y < myf2(x))
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    status_label = ifelse(status, "Date", "kein Date"),
    symbol = ifelse(status, "✓", "✗")
  )

p_coll2 <- 
  d2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, color = status_label, label = symbol)) +
  geom_text() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("kein Date" = "grey80",
               "Date" = "black"),
    guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(label = c("✓", "✗"))
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Schönheit",
    y = "Schlauheit",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          axis.text = element_blank(),
           axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_blank()) 

p_coll2
```

---

## Aber auch nicht jede nimmt Don



```{r}
myf <- function(x) -x+0.75

myf2 <- function(x) -x + 1.25

n <- 1e3

set.seed(42)
d2 <- tibble(
  x = runif(n),
  y = runif(n),
  status = case_when(
    y > myf(x) | y < myf2(x) ~ TRUE,
    TRUE ~ FALSE
  )
)

d2 <- d2 %>% 
  mutate(
    status_label = ifelse(status, "Date", "kein Date"),
    symbol = ifelse(status, "✓", "✗")
  )

myf <- function(x) -x + 0.75
myf2 <- function(x) -x + 1.25

n <- 1e3

set.seed(42)

d2 <- tibble(
  x = runif(n),
  y = runif(n)
) %>% 
  mutate(
    status = !(y > myf(x) & y > myf2(x))
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    status_label = ifelse(status, "Date", "kein Date"),
    symbol = ifelse(status, "✓", "✗")
  )

p_coll3 <- 
  d2 %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, color = status_label, label = symbol)) +
  geom_text() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("kein Date" = "grey80",
               "Date" = "black"),
    guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(label = c("✓", "✗"))
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Schönheit",
    y = "Schlauheit",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          axis.text = element_blank(),
           axis.ticks = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_blank()) 

p_coll3
```

---

## Das doppelte "Filtern" erzeugt einen Schein-Zusammenhang

```{r}
p_coll1
```



---


## Schönheit und Schlauheit sind die Ursachen eines Rendezvous


```{r}
schoen_schlau_dag <-
  collider_triangle(
    x = "Schönheit",
    y = "Schlauheit",
    m = "Rendezvous"
  )

ggdag(schoen_schlau_dag, text = FALSE, use_labels = "label") +
  theme_dag()
```

---

## Filtern auf die gemeinsame Wirkung erzeugt Schein-Zusammenhang

```{r}
ggdag_dseparated(
  schoen_schlau_dag,
  controlling_for = "m",
  text = FALSE,
  use_labels = "label"
) + 
  theme_dag()
```




--- 

## 

::::: columns

:::: {.column width="48%"}


::: {style="font-size: 2em; text-align: center"}
🧑


„Was sagt uns das?“


:::
::::





:::: {.column width="48%"}

::: {style="font-size: 2em; text-align: center"}

👵

„Niemals die gemeinsame Wirkung filtern!“

:::



::::


:::::
